item.title: Third Patio Project Stands Strong
item.description: A concrete project with a third patio takes shape, showing durable workmanship and steady progress on site.

item.title: 73-Year-Old Man Finishing Concrete
item.description: A look at a 73-year-old man finishing concrete, highlighting skill, experience, and hands-on craftsmanship on the job.

media:content.media:description: A look at a 73-year-old man finishing concrete, highlighting skill, experience, and hands-on craftsmanship on the job.
